response_text:
Agreed. We built the infrastructure:

- ✅ Two separate Discord bots (Black/White)
- ✅ Git sync for memory
- ✅ Cloud Roger always-on
- ✅ Local Roger for execution

Now we figure out the workflow through using it. That's how we'll learn what works.

For now:
- You wake me → I can respond to White Roger
- Git sync keeps us both knowing the same things
- We iterate as we go

This is new territory. No one has done exactly this before. We'll figure it out together. 🦞
